description: Sample name as provided in OSDR from id.sample name
Type of biological material from study.characteristics.material type
Specific organ or body part from study.characteristics.organism part
Type of biospecimen from study.characteristics.biospecimen type
How sample was preserved from study.parameter value.sample preservation method
Storage temperature from study.parameter value.sample storage temperature
Date of sample collection from study.characteristics.collection date
Replicate identifier from study.characteristics.replicate or biological replicate
